extension.valueString: Cannot be a date in the future

item.text: Risk communication & community engagement (RCCE) strategy in place?
Vaccinators trained on Mpox vaccine administration?
Vaccinators trained on AEFI recognition & reporting?
Vaccinators trained on infection prevention (hard hygiene, waste disposal)?
Vaccine supplies and Cold Chain Management
Cold chain maintained (2–8°C) with temperature logs?
Emergency stock reserved for high-risk areas?
Site meets infection prevention standards (handwashing, distancing)?
Separate zones: Registration, Screening, Vaccination, Observation?
Privacy ensured (e.g., curtains for undressing if intradermal)?
Emergency kit with adrenaline, 2ml Syringe and needle available?
Did the vaccinators administer Mpox vaccine in the correct site as per the guidelines (Observation)?
Aseptic technique (Dry cotton swap, sterile syringe and needle)?
Vaccination data entered in National Public Health Intelligence platform daily (NPHIIS)?
AEFIs reported immediately to the team supervisor?
Data Collection tools available and adequate?
Is the generated healthcare waste properly segregated?
Sensitization materials in local languages (Swahili, vernacular)?
Have the AEFI forms been filled at the facility level and cascaded to the sub-county?
Have you heard any rumors / hesitancy on Mpox vaccine?
If yes, select all that apply

valueCoding.display: Mpox vaccine is Bill and Melinda depopulation agenda
Mpox vaccine is not safe and can cause serious side effects
Mpox vaccine is a way of finishing the COVID-19 vaccine

item.text: State what you did with the rumor
Did you trust the source of the rumor?
Which steps did you take to address the rumor?
